data.title: Texture & pattern generation (stipple, grain, watercolor, favicon)

data.body: Generate computational/procedural visual elements per research/03 pipeline. Stipple fields (SVG/Canvas), paper grain (enhance CSS feTurbulence or raster), watercolor wash treatments (transparent PNGs), section backgrounds, favicon ('P' lettermark). All assets must support transparency for collage layering. Deliverable: production-ready assets in public/textures/ with usage docs.
